resources.string: Offline Japanese→English translation for KOReader. Engine: llama.cpp (MIT) serving LiquidAI LFM2-350M-ENJP-MT (LFM Open License v1.0). The first start copies the 230 MB model out of the app, which takes a moment. In KOReader: Japanese → Local translation server → http://127.0.0.1:8087, then “Use the local translator”.
